---
applyTo: "**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx},**/setupTests.ts,**/test-utils/**"
---

# Testing Guidelines (Vitest)

- Write tests for complex logic and business rules; cover branches and error paths.
- Test user interactions and edge cases.
- Mock API calls and external dependencies.
- Use clear, behavior-focused, descriptive test names.
- Aim for 80%+ coverage on new/changed logic.
